title: The Sword of Ghix – a retro game made by a 13 yo with AI Assisted tools
abstract: Inspired by the other Show HN post, I would like to share my kid's (13 yo) summer project. The whole game was made by himself within a few weeks after the summer break started. His coding stack is vscode + Claude Code + Godot MCP. He has some programming background, knows some basic python&#x2F
abstract_zh: 嗨，小伙伴们！看看这小子，小小年纪才十三岁，暑假里捣鼓出个啥玩意儿？原来是个复古风游戏《刀锋·吉克斯》啊！代码敲得噼里啪啦响，用的是VSCode、Claude Code这些高科技工具，还有个叫Godot MCP的游戏引擎。别说，这孩子还真有点编程范儿，连Python都拿捏住了。看着吧，未来的编程小能手就是他了！
